verdict_reasoning: MAP2K1 (MEK1) is a soluble cytoplasmic serine/threonine kinase and core component of the intracellular MAPK/ERK signaling cascade. It lacks any membrane anchor (no TM domain, no GPI anchor), is not known to encode membrane-anchored isoforms, and has no documented cell-surface pool or tissue-restricted surface form. It is a canonical intracellular signaling kinase, not a surface protein.
